example_project.name: SousMeow
example_project.note: SousMeow is a real application. This VibeKB model was derived by reading the SousMeow source read-only; SousMeow is NOT bundled into VibeKB. File paths in these records are relative to projects/sousmeow/ in the source repository. This model can go stale if SousMeow changes — future agents must re-verify against the source before changing functionality claims.

structure.project: project/ — identity, intent, current state, constraints
structure.system: system/ — mental model, components, flows, storage, deployment
structure.memory: memory/ — decisions, constraints, assumptions, warnings, discoveries, changes
structure.work: work/ — current AI work, handoff, sessions
